parameters.name: vikunja_list_projects
parameters.description: List all Vikunja projects with their IDs. No parameters needed.

parameters.name: vikunja_list_tasks
parameters.description: List tasks in a Vikunja project. Parameters: project_id (required, from vikunja_list_projects), page (page number, default 1), per_page (tasks per page, default 20), sort_by (field to sort by like 'due_date' or 'priority'), order_by ('asc' or 'desc')

value.page: ={{ $fromAI('page', 'Page number or empty string for page 1', 'string') }}
value.per_page: ={{ $fromAI('per_page', 'Tasks per page or empty string for default 20', 'string') }}
value.sort_by: ={{ $fromAI('sort_by', 'Sort field like due_date or priority, or empty string', 'string') }}
value.order_by: ={{ $fromAI('order_by', 'asc or desc, or empty string for default', 'string') }}

schema.description: Tasks per page or empty string
asc or desc or empty string

parameters.name: vikunja_get_task
parameters.description: Get details of a single Vikunja task. Parameters: task_id (required)

parameters.name: vikunja_create_task
parameters.description: Create a new task in a Vikunja project. Parameters: project_id (required), title (required), description (task details), due_date (ISO format like '2026-04-01T12:00:00Z'), priority (0=unset, 1=low, 2=medium, 3=high, 4=urgent)

value.title: ={{ $fromAI('title', 'Task title', 'string') }}
value.due_date: ={{ $fromAI('due_date', 'Due date in ISO format or empty string', 'string') }}

parameters.name: vikunja_update_task
parameters.description: Update an existing Vikunja task. Parameters: task_id (required), title (new title), description (new description), due_date (new due date in ISO format), done ('true' or 'false' to change completion), priority (0-4)

value.title: ={{ $fromAI('title', 'New title or empty string to keep current', 'string') }}
value.description: ={{ $fromAI('description', 'New description or empty string to keep current', 'string') }}
value.due_date: ={{ $fromAI('due_date', 'New due date or empty string to keep current', 'string') }}
value.done: ={{ $fromAI('done', 'true or false or empty string to keep current', 'string') }}
value.priority: ={{ $fromAI('priority', 'Priority 0-4 or empty string to keep current', 'string') }}

parameters.name: vikunja_delete_task
parameters.description: Delete a Vikunja task. Parameters: task_id (required)
